policy.note: This plan probes local tool availability and defines guarded innovation lanes. It does not install tools, read private sources or run OCR/extraction on private content.

lanes.name: MarkItDown for KosmoPrepare M2
lanes.intent: Convert allowed documents into Markdown for downstream metadata extraction and review packs.
allowed_now: compare output structure against KosmoPrepare package import expectations
blocked_until: real source root recorded before private book/PDF conversion
lanes.first_smoke: Create a tiny synthetic public-domain text/PDF fixture and verify Markdown output contains no private content.
lanes.promotion_gate: No private Markdown enters Git; private outputs stay under KosmoZentrale private inventory paths.

lanes.name: Local OCR for Scanned Architecture Sources
lanes.intent: Evaluate OCR fallback for scanned plans/books after source-root and rights gates.
allowed_now: document OCR contract and forbidden fields
run OCR only on synthetic/public fixture images
define confidence and redaction checks before any private use
blocked_until: private output path outside Git exists
lanes.first_smoke: Use one generated/public image fixture with a short text label; write only metadata and confidence summary.
lanes.promotion_gate: OCR text from private scans is never committed; only owner-approved summaries may enter review packs.

lanes.name: Qwen Embeddings/Reranking for KosmoReferences RAG
lanes.intent: Prepare local semantic search over reviewed project metadata, not raw private PDFs.
allowed_now: benchmark retrieval on the three pilot package summaries
blocked_until: private source root and pilot metadata inventory pass
lanes.first_smoke: Embed only pilot IDs, titles and own-written summaries; verify no source excerpts are present.
lanes.promotion_gate: Embedding corpus manifest must prove source class, rights state and no raw private text.

lanes.name: IfcOpenShell Geometry/Structure Lane
lanes.intent: Use IFC parsing as the future bridge from reference/project packages to model-layer reasoning.
blocked_until: private source-dependent geometry remains blocked until provenance is known
lanes.first_smoke: Run semantic proof on existing demo IFC only, then connect output to pilot evidence gaps.
lanes.promotion_gate: No derived model asset becomes public-ready without file-level provenance and human review.

lanes.name: Paper2Poster Logic for KosmoPublish
lanes.intent: Borrow paper-to-poster planning as a layout reasoning pattern for architectural boards and review packs.
allowed_now: map pilot reference evidence into poster sections
blocked_until: actual image/plan placement waits for rights and provenance review
lanes.first_smoke: Generate a layout JSON skeleton for Villa/Sogn/Ingenbohl with empty media slots.
lanes.promotion_gate: KosmoPublish exports remain review-only until media rights are resolved.

next_actions: Run public/synthetic smoke tests only for MarkItDown, OCR and embeddings.
Use existing IFC demo assets for geometry experiments.
Keep private source-dependent innovation work blocked until source-root decision passes.
After smoke tests, add per-lane guards before any worker or local LLM can run the tools autonomously.
